item.title: Life achievement unlocked!
item.description: I had to go to a court hearing because my state is dumb, but my district’s judge is the chillest dude on the fucking plane. It was a group hearing and he started with “everyone take a deep breath; I’ve already signed all your orders, but I’m required to do this hearing so I just want to get to know you all a little better.”
item.dc:creator: honkems

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1200 (spaghetini)
item.description:
Wow. I've done this 1200 times. That's, what, approximately 57,600 memes? Happy to be of service to y'all. Let's get this bread.
Aw look they're on a date.
BIG MOOD.
Aztec depiction of a solar eclipse.
Getting better about that last one.
Ah, yes, Pandemic Daydrinking. I vaguely remember that. I was at a bottle of wine a day plus a cocktail before I got to meet Pippin. Nowadays it's barely a bottle of wine a week. Much healthier approach.
I'd watch it.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Hey Pippin! Hey! Whatdoin? Pretty boy."
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Monday Eve Dump
item.description:
So punny!
I can hear his voice
I hate how true this feels
*existential dread
One opportunity
I still try an olive every year to see if I like them yet
*me after the Superbowl
This is correct
Just thought this was super cool
Ha!
Cat tax. Have a good night everyone!
item.dc:creator: WanderingUterus

item.title: It's another unhinged XL Monday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
i'm in danger.. greeting online friends
I believe former VP Dick Cheney had a similar mishap
that poor man
at least its a salad and not a tastier option
this news has shocked and befuddled me
obviously
fish tanks are the coolest have always wanted one
no brainer
always
finally
mmm hmm
looks like AI somehow
gotta keep em wet
at least take me out to dinner first!
the time is now
as is tradition
great question has anyone looked into this?
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: This was probably scary and also intriguing at the same time
item.description: Cheetahs have been my favorite land animal for awhile. Watching them run and control themselves at those speeds, it's just insane! Source: https://www.wecb.fm/wildlife-photographer-wakes-up-from-a-nap-under-a-tree-with-a-sleeping-cheetah-against-him/ Edit: thanks @JadeRabbit21 for a video source. https://youtu.be/JlGfi2ofzFc

item.title: Images of Note: Nutty
item.description:
Cat pope, Cat pope, Cat pope, Cat pope, Cat pope
I wonder what he was smokin'
This is basically what happens when there's a new Train Sim World released.
Start manually breathing
Yeah
D:
I try all the time.
making a functioning mobile app is a better thing to do than making an app that just does nothing but act as a website.
pet pet pet pet pet pet pet
C O N E
The only thing they fear is Stardew Valley
See, I'm not the only one who ships Penny and Maru. ConcernedApe: After the Farmer marries can they get together?
I wish I could tag Eric in this
Dick Cheney made money off the Iraq War.
Before turning on the sound I swore he had a Welsh accent.
They took the drugs, and the drugs are working.
Talking of trains, may I introduce you to Cycloped? https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cycloped
You joke, but making people pay money to leave their house is basically what a lot of American towns do by default.
Heilung is the band name, brilliant music if you are doing some arcane ritual like installing Arch Linux or raising the dead.
Obama as a reaper drone
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay Also Streeeeeeam: http://twitch.abbii.gay

item.title: dump for engineers who like pickles
item.description:
mmmm breaker finder 3000
unironically tho i love this pose
one of the cardinal rules of a ship's engine room is don't get fuken close to the shaft. cue a mf straddling a line shaft bearing like a cowboy, lookin like he wants to get wrapped up like a ball of human yarn.
good for her
prank youtube has gotten out of hand
i believe in ghosts but this is still funny. zak bagans yelling "did u hear that" will always be funny.
dr honeydew and beaker would also be nice
fukn love corollas
let. things. be. open. source.
this is step one in getting goth mermaids

item.title: Every morning and night I send my two adult sons, their SOs, and my wife a batch of memes as an I love you. Dad jokes, motivational jams, advice, words of affirmation, oddball humor, nightmare fuel, and more. Here’s my latest batch. DFTBA.

item.title: Sports Bra
item.description: Despite the incontestable excellence of female athletes across the world, there is still a massive disparity in the media coverage they receive. Did you know that 85% of total television coverage focuses on men’s sports? And that’s only in the last 5 years as women’s sports coverage has tripled. Women’s leagues aren’t the focus of mainstream media, nor are they featured at local bars – Portland bar owner, Jenny Nguyen, is working to change that. ? The Sports Bra, a bar dedicated to women’s sports, was created to provide a social environment that fully devotes itself to women’s athletics. It was the first U.S. bar to do so but it certainly won’t be the last! Nguyen’s goal has always been to create “a sports bar where women’s sports are on, and the bathroom is always clean, and the menu has gluten-free options.” Bottom line: in a world filled with sports bars, we are in desperate need of more sports bras! Now, with investment from Alexis Ohanian’s 776 Foundation, The Sports Bra plans to franchise, expoanding to other U.S. cities. “You look at all these sports now and there’s undeniable excellence coming from women and I’m just looking for all the ways we can reinforce and build and do it in a way that makes sense with the community,” said @alexisohanian. Let’s go ?
item.dc:creator: psychichic

item.title: MyAnimeList 2024 v1.1 (Alphabetical)

item.dc:creator: maureoko

item.title: That's deep
item.description: Ed Harris has publicly refused to speak about his experiences working on "The Abyss" (1989), saying, "I'm not talking about 'The Abyss' and I never will." One of the few things he said about it was "Asking me how I was treated on 'The Abyss' is like asking a soldier how he was treated in Vietnam." Similarly, Mary Elizabeth Mastrantonio said, "'The Abyss' was a lot of things. Fun to make was not one of them." Cast members had to become certified divers before filming began. The Deepcore crew started training together in the Caribbean one month before filming, in order to create a sense of camaraderie. Harris was not among them, as he was still filming another movie, so he got his certificate while training in a lake nearby. The actors playing the SEALs received a separate, military training. At the end of the shoot, Harris was the most accomplished diver (near-professional level) despite not having trained a single day in the actual ocean. During underwater filming, Harris almost drowned a few times. One time was while filming the scene where he had to swim without a suit at the bottom of the submerged set, and the safety diver took very long to hand him a breathing regulator. However, the closest call came during the descent into the Abyss. Harris was wearing a helmet filled with liquid, and had to hold his breath while he was towed along a set. When he ran out of air, he gave the signal for oxygen, but his safety diver got hung up on a cable and could not get to him. Another crew member gave Harris a regulator, but it was upside down and caused him to suck in water. Underwater cinematographer Al Giddings saw what happened, ripped the upside down regulator, and gave him his own in the correct orientation. Later that evening, Ed broke down and cried. The studio was considering Mel Gibson, Dennis Quaid, William Hurt, Harrison Ford, Kurt Russell and Patrick Swayze for the role of Virgil 'Bud' Brigman. Cameron suggested Ed Harris, but the studio was concerned about his lack of experience as leading man, as well as his receding hairline (something that Cameron felt added to his everyman appeal). Harris convinced the studio with a screen test where he wore a motorcycle helmet as a diving helmet. Happy Birthday, Ed Harris!...
item.dc:creator: kickarr
